name: ENDME
short_description: ENDME – an indie game in which one IT guy is about to lose himself. He worked hard but his director canceled all that was done. Be careful! You'll need to shoot, jump and go through the consciousness thorns of our character to the end!
detailed_description:
Ante Factum

This is the studio's first game and we are interested in your opinion!
Feel free to write a comment, even and especially if you don't like something.
Have fun!

​Description

The guy, whose name is shrouded in mystery, gets into an unpleasant life situation.
The owner of the company where he worked for a long time left this business.
The new head forced him to work 24/7 for several months.
After – all the work of our kid was in vain. Or not?


Quest. Collect socks, hack security protocols and spend time at nothingdoingness.
Shooter. Check your eardrums and friendship with hedgehogs at the same time.
Platformer. Finally it'll take you out or it'll be defeated by your skill and self-confidence.

Gameplay time ~40 minutes (fast), ~90 minutes (normal).

Post Scriptum

I'd like to thank several people who inspired, supported,
hindered and harmed me on the way making this game.
Thank you.
